meaning: n.琉球群岛(位于中国台湾岛与日本九州岛之间)
examples: China had the suzerainty over Ryukyu since Ming Dynasty.
The Ryukyu zither and later by the Arab Moors (MOOR) spread to Europe.
Japan seized Ryukyu in 1879 and changed its name to Okinawa Prefecture.
The phrases have a particular rhythm, based upon traditional poetry and the distinctive intonation of the Ryukyu scale, and are performed in the ancient language of Okinawa.
